title: Havoc (disambiguation)
content:
'''Havoc''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Havoc (ARC trooper)|Havoc]]''', an [[Advanced Recon Commando|ARC trooper]] who served in the [[Battle of Kamino]]
*'''[[Havoc (clone trooper)|Havoc]]''', a [[clone trooper]] in [[Tango Company]]
*'''[[Havoc Outpost]]''', a  trading and supply base in [[Wild Space]]

==Legends==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Havoc (ARC trooper)/Legends|Havoc]]''', an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] who served in the [[Battle of Kamino/Legends|Battle of Kamino]]
*[[Havoc (clone trooper)/Legends|'''Havoc''']], a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] in [[Tango Company/Legends|Tango Company]] who was involved in the [[Second Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Second Battle of Geonosis]]

===Vessels===
[[File:HavocNym.png|thumb|right|270px|Nym's Scurrg H-6 bomber, ''Havoc'']]
*The '''[[Havoc (Strike-class)|''Havoc'']]''' cruiser, an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*The '''[[Havoc (Imperial-class)|''Havoc'']]''' Star Destroyer, an Imperial [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] during the Galactic Civil War
*The '''[[Havoc (starfighter)|''Havoc'']]''' bomber, a [[Scurrg H-6 prototype bomber]] starfighter used by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] in the years directly preceding the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]

===Organizations===
*'''[[Havoc Squad]]''', a trooper regiment during the [[Great Galactic War]] and the following [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Galactic Cold War]]
*'''[[Havoc Squadron]]''', a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Havoc
|ja=ハヴォック
}}
